full_text:
Qian Zhao (Zijing) 牽招 (子經)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Qian Zhao (牽招), styledZijing (子經), was born in Anping. Persuaded the Wuhuan to side with Cao Cao over the Yuan’s. Mourned Yuan Shang. Qian Zhao was affiliated with Yuan Shao, Yuan Shang, and the Wei Kingdom.
